## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

The problem this solves or the motivation.

## How

Key implementation notes (design decisions, tradeoffs).

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -r build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -r typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -r test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm smoke` passes (packaging import smoke)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) for user-facing changes
- [ ] Updated docs (`apps/docs`) if applicable

Closes #
